offers.title: Squad
offers.description: Squad is a large-scale combined arms multiplayer first-person shooter emphasizing combat realism through communication, team play, and strong squad cohesion feeding into larger-scale coordination, tactics, and planning.

offers.title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI
offers.description: Civilization VI offers new ways to interact with your world, expand your empire across the map, advance your culture, and compete against history’s greatest leaders to build a civilization that will stand the test of time.

offers.title: Kings Do Not Fall
offers.description: When the kingdom needs a legend, you don’t fall... you rise. In a land torn apart, an entire army has fallen. Embark on a classic beat ’em up, just like we loved to play in the 90s.

offers.title: Windbreath Character Supply Chest: Hellfire
offers.description: Secret Letter: Hellfire x10,  Weapon Manual Ⅲ x10, Combat Melody Ⅲ x10, and Carmine Globule x1000

seller.name: Hong Kong Spiral Rising Technology Co., Limited

offers.publisherDisplayName: Hong Kong Spiral Rising Technology Co., Limited

offers.title: Lost Ember: Rekindled Edition
offers.description: Explore the acclaimed animal adventure in never before seen beauty! Slip into the role of different animals to uncover the fate of an ancient world. Dive into deep waters, fly at lofty heights or climb steep cliffs, there are lots of ways of getting around.

offers.title: KRASNIY-ZAVOD: Operational Credits Pack
offers.description:
Authorize your Combat Operations Contract. This pack activates the full in-game war economy and gear saving. Economy: Earn, spend, and trade mission funds. Persistence: Save all extracted gear and loot.
Armory: Buy and customize weaponry. Digital consumable.

offers.title: Sea Walker Saga
offers.description: An exciting steampunk adventure with strategy and RPG elements. Fight pirates, explore the seabed, build your own battle island and set out into the vast world ocean in search of a mythical continent!

offers.title: Iron Offensive: Helmet Cam Extraction Shooter
offers.description: I’ve eradicated 20-minute walking sims. High-density micro-maps with instant action from second zero. Gritty photorealism, physical immersion and war economy. TP-Link zones are mobile: chase the enemy intelligence and defend the final transmission.

offers.title: Iron Offensive: Founder’s Pack Lite
offers.description:
PAY ONCE. UNLOCK UNLIMITED INFILTRATION.
Your initial 40-minute trial becomes permanent and unrestricted. This license unlocks 50% of all current and future operations, maps, and modes. One payment to break the limit and own your sector for life.

offers.title: Iron Offensive: Founder’s Pack
offers.description:
PAY ONCE. COMMAND WITHOUT LIMITS.
Unlock ultimate clearance and make your 40-minute trial permanent. Includes Complete Directive + ALL future maps & logs for life. Unblock the theater and command the zone forever. LIMITED OFFER: Founder Status only. Will NEVER be sold again.
